description:
Update an issue's status or assignment in Sentry. This allows you to resolve, ignore, or reassign issues.

Use this tool when you need to:
- Resolve an issue that has been fixed
- Assign an issue to a team member or team for investigation
- Mark an issue as ignored to reduce noise
- Reopen a resolved issue by setting status to 'unresolved'

Note: If the user provides the issueUrl, you can ignore the other required parameters and extract them from the URL. At least one of status or assignedTo must be provided. assignedTo format: 'user:ID' (e.g., 'user:123456') or 'team:ID_OR_SLUG' (e.g., 'team:my-team-slug').

organizationSlug.description: The organization slug (required when providing issueId instead of issueUrl).

issueId.description: The Sentry issue short ID (e.g., 'PROJECT-123'). Either issueId or issueUrl must be provided.

issueUrl.description: Full URL of the Sentry issue. If provided, organizationSlug and issueId can be omitted.

assignedTo.description: User or team to assign the issue to. Format: 'user:123456' for users or 'team:my-team-slug' for teams.
